untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identification of two distinct peaks of similar height with a valley between them. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and comparisons. Specifically: detecting peak formation, measuring peak-to-peak similarity (0-3%), validating valley depth (10-20%), confirming rounded/wide peak shapes, and verifying uptrend duration cannot be fully encoded in the allowed indicator syntax. Stop placement and target price rules marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source.
translation_notes: Simplified entry conditions use price above SMA_20 (uptrend proxy) and high not exceeding previous high (peak formation indicator). Exit uses crossback below SMA_20 as reversal signal. Full double-top pattern recognition with peak detection, similarity validation, and valley measurement would require custom pattern logic outside the allowed indicator framework.
